brand.name: Cerelyx
brand.tagline: Beautiful websites for the moments that matter.

marketing.heroTitle: Your celebration deserves more than a group chat.
marketing.heroSubtitle: Create a stunning website for your wedding or any life event, share it on your own address, and collect RSVPs — all in a few minutes.
marketing.featuresTitle: Everything your guests need, in one place
marketing.feature1Body: Hand-crafted themes with real character — recolour and restyle them to match your celebration.
marketing.feature2Body: Publish to yourname.cerelyx.online in one tap. Share it once; it works everywhere.
marketing.feature3Body: Guests reply in seconds and you watch responses roll in — no more chasing.
marketing.step1Body: Choose a theme made for your kind of event.
marketing.step2Body: Names, dates, your story and the schedule — guided all the way.
marketing.step3Body: Go live on your subdomain and share with everyone.
marketing.ctaBody: It's free to start. No credit card, no fuss.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to keep building your celebration.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start your event website — it takes a minute.

dashboard.title: Your events
dashboard.subtitle: Create, edit and publish your celebration sites.
dashboard.empty: You haven't created an event yet.
